case_title: RETNOWATI, ENDANG et al VS BONOVICH, DAVID

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RETNOWATI, ENDANG NUGROHO, EMIRZA AS TO DEFENDANT BONOVICH, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BONOVICH, DAVID

REM: PETITION OF MINOR PLTF FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM, FILED IN COURT.
